# tree Provider

Interact with a tree of information.

## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "scaffolding" {
  # example configuration here
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `kms_key_arn` (String) The ARN of the KMS key to use for encrypting the DynamoDB storage.
- `profile` (String) The AWS profile to use for DynamoDB storage.
- `region` (String) The AWS region to use for DynamoDB storage.
- `table_name` (String) The table name to use for DynamoDB storage.
